site.name: Tuukka Pitkänen
site.title: Tuukka Pitkänen — Portfolio
site.description: Portfolio of Tuukka Pitkänen: web development, React, programming projects, and collaboration details.

about.title: About
paragraphs: I am a 25-year-old from Oulu with a strong passion for programming. My social skills and ability to listen help me understand people's needs and turn them into working digital solutions.

I am a diligent builder who sees projects through to completion. I am self-taught and have worked with React, React Native, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and Java — with React and React Native at the center of my focus.
In my free time I listen to music, play games, and create my own music. Below is one of my tracks on SoundCloud.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: My current programming and tool skills.

resume.title: Résumé
resume.summary: 25 years old, originally from Kemijärvi, military service completed. Business graduate by education. Strengths include self-directed learning, diligence, and teamwork. Interested in game and website development.

notFound.title: Page not found

neon-drift.title: Neon Drift
neon-drift.subtitle: Embedded arcade prototype
neon-drift.description: Neon Drift is a browser-native survival shooter woven into this portfolio—not listed in navigation, not promoted elsewhere. It exists as a technical exercise in canvas rendering, lightweight post-processing, and real-time audio inside a production Next.js site.
neon-drift.teaser: A classified signal inside the portfolio. No public route—only those who look closer.
neon-drift.lede: Survive the swarm. Build synergies. Outlast waves that never forgive hesitation.
neon-drift.briefingExtra: The experience ships as an easter egg: a discreet control in the corner of every page, and a direct launch from this dossier. Progress, high scores, and achievements stay on-device.
neon-drift.feature0: Modular game architecture (simulation, combat, waves, bosses) with quality-scaled rendering
neon-drift.feature1: Seven enemy archetypes, round-based escalation, and boss encounters with telegraphed patterns
neon-drift.feature2: Roguelike draft upgrades, build synergies, local achievements, and run recap
neon-drift.feature3: Adaptive visuals and HTML5 audio tuned for stable performance on the open web
neon-drift.launchHint: WASD · mouse aim · Shift dash · P or Esc to pause

meta.label: Access

eternal-cry.subtitle: Video game
eternal-cry.description: An action platformer with a rich story, action, secrets, and enemies. Built with GameMaker Studio. I also started a website for the project. Currently on hold.

vectorama.title: Vectorama
vectorama.subtitle: Web game
vectorama.description: A Kahoot-style browser game for the Vectorama event where players guess who is the AI. Uses OpenAI API and Firebase. Chat room still in progress.

text-adventure.title: Text Adventure
text-adventure.subtitle: AI story game
text-adventure.description: Practice project for React modules. A text adventure where AI starts and continues the story; the user can steer direction. Still being improved.

wordle.title: Wordle
wordle.subtitle: React / React Native
wordle.description: A Wordle-style game: the player guesses a word in five attempts. Goal is a web and mobile app with React and React Native.
